assignments.rationale: Asks about ANY warning light, so any non-null warning_light_named fully answers yes (the 'especially' clause is a hint, not a separate option).

pull_direction fully encodes the answer: left/right means a consistent one-direction drift (yes), varies_or_wanders means no, no_pull means no - same mapping the catalog already uses for questions 218 and 695.
Any non-null fluid_color means the customer saw fluid under the vehicle, which fully answers yes; mirrors the catalog's pre-assigned q402 puddle question.

The question is location-agnostic (any puddle under the car), and fluid_under_car_location is non-null exactly when the customer described fluid under the vehicle — every allowed value, including unsure, maps to Yes, so the slot fully determines the answer.

smoke_color is non-null only when the customer described visible smoke/haze (including visible_but_color_unclear), which directly yields the 'visible smoke' answer; smell-only cases leave it null so the question is still asked.
Already assigned in file (speed_band) — listed for completeness only; not an empty target. NOTE: ignore this row if the harness treats it as a change; value matches the existing assignment.
fluid_color is only extracted when the customer described fluid seen under the vehicle, so any non-null value fully determines the answer yes; null keeps the question asked.
